message:
fix(core): tighten index assertion and un-ignore schema cookie round-trip test

- Index rename-column assertions now check for parenthesized column
  names `(new_col)` / `(old_col)` instead of bare substrings, avoiding
  false positives when the column name appears elsewhere in the SQL.
- Remove `#[ignore]` and the stale NOTE comment from
  `test_schema_cookie_persists_round_trip` — the pager header write
  wiring (5D.4) is now in place, so the round-trip test passes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
